# kSecAttrSecurityDomain

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is a string indicating the item’s security domain.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrSecurityDomain: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFString] and represents the Internet security domain. Items of class [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecClassInternetPassword] have this attribute.
title: kSecAttrSecurityDomain
